description: Whether hooks can run asynchronously without blocking the agent's execution loop. Fire-and-forget semantics.

amp.mechanism: Amp hooks run synchronously; no async execution documented

claude-code.mechanism: hook_async_execution: async: true on command handlers runs hook in background without blocking; decisions ignored; systemMessage delivered on next turn; asyncRewake: true also wakes Claude on exit code 2

cline.mechanism: Cline hooks run synchronously before/after tool events; no async execution documented

codex.mechanism: hook_execution_mode: Codex supports async hook execution mode for fire-and-forget background hook runs

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI hooks run synchronously; no async execution documented

crush.mechanism: Hooks are synchronous; each fires before the tool executes and must complete within the configured timeout.

cursor.mechanism: Hooks run synchronously; no async/background flag documented.

factory-droid.mechanism: Matching hooks for the same event execute concurrently (in parallel); deduplication consolidates identical commands automatically

gemini-cli.mechanism: Gemini CLI hooks run synchronously; no async execution documented

kiro.mechanism: Kiro hooks run synchronously; no async execution documented

pi.mechanism: Pi extension handlers are awaited synchronously in registration order; no fire-and-forget async execution documented

windsurf.mechanism: Windsurf hooks run synchronously; post_cascade_response and post_cascade_response_with_transcript fire asynchronously after the response but hooks themselves do not execute fire-and-forget
